title: adopt/materialize input
description: Input Contract for adopt/materialize (ADR-0088): the core-resolved coordinates the pod-side transform needs. The AWX token is NOT here — it resolves in-pod from the CredentialRef named by credentialMount via the SecretBroker (§2.5). kind/identity/source/nativeId/live are graph-read results from adopt.Resolve; the pod does the targeted deep-read + awximport transform.

endpoint.description: the read-only AWX API endpoint for the targeted deep-read

nativeId.description: the foreign-system object id the deep-read is keyed on

source.description: the Source that projects the object (stamps adopted-from lineage)

live.description: pre-resolved still-enabled foreign-side executions for the cutover guard (ADR-0086 §4)

credentialMount.description: the CredentialRef name whose material the SecretBroker resolves in-pod
